title: dalbergia nigrescens var. anomala
intro: Dalbergia nigrescens var. anomala, also known as the Black Dalbergia or Anomalous Black Dalbergia, is a variety of the Black Dalbergia tree, a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as providing protection against bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of Dalbergia nigrescens var. anomala are typically made from its bark, leaves, or roots, and may be consumed as teas, infusions, or extracted into oils and tinctures for medicinal use.
